content: The intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) from curiosity-driven autonomous agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory, where only surprising, prediction-error-triggered experiences are encoded into long-term agent memory instead of storing all interaction data. This creates a self-sustaining active learning cycle where curiosity not only drives exploration of new environments but also shapes the memory structure that improves future exploration.
